overall.description: First-person exploration of a coastal fishing village at night in a video game. The player character moves from a patio area through narrow dirt paths between wooden shacks, eventually reaching a dock area with fresh fish displayed in nets. The environment features atmospheric lighting with dark cloudy skies and artificial lights from buildings.

events.description: camera moves away from the table and begins walking toward the house

agents.ego_description: moving around the plastic patio table, examining the surroundings before heading toward the green wooden house

entered.detail: square white plastic patio table with tiled surface
white plastic outdoor chairs surrounding the table
green painted wooden house wall with shuttered windows
terracotta pots with flowering plants near the house entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dimly lit patio at night, focused on a white plastic table and chairs. The camera moves around the furniture and begins walking toward a green wooden house, passing potted plants near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between wooden village houses

events.description: exits the patio area and moves along the side of the green house into open yard
passes through narrow gap between the green house and blue shack

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of the green wooden house on a dirt path, navigating the narrow space between buildings

entered.detail: weathered wooden picket fence marking property boundary
tall tree with dense foliage silhouetted against night sky
wooden fishing boat resting on the ground near the fence
small blue painted wooden structure with shuttered windows

segments.scene_description: Moving from the patio into a narrow side yard, the camera follows a dirt path along the green house wall. The space opens slightly to reveal a wooden fence, a large tree, and a beached wooden boat before squeezing through a narrow passage between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal village street with wooden shacks and beached boats

events.description: colorful lights from the distant yellow building become visible through the darkness
camera turns slightly toward the lit building while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking through the open village area, approaching a building with bright colorful lights, passing beached boats along the dirt road

entered.detail: yellow wooden house illuminated by green and red string lights
wooden telephone pole with wires stretching across the street
metal fishing boat turned upside down on the dirt ground

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage into a wider village street, the scene opens up to show multiple wooden shacks and beached boats under a cloudy night sky. A yellow house with colorful string lights glows in the distance, drawing the camera forward along the dirt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: fishing dock with fresh catch displayed

events.description: moves from dirt road onto concrete fishing dock area
camera slows and focuses on the pile of fish in the net on the ground

agents.ego_description: approaching the fish pile on the dock, examining the fresh catch scattered on the concrete, then looking up toward a woman standing nearby

notable_agents.action: woman in pink shirt and jeans standing near the fish pile, appearing to work at the market stall

entered.detail: large pile of fresh fish contained in a fishing net on the concrete ground
individual fish scattered on the concrete around the main pile
wooden table and structure used for displaying goods

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a concrete fishing dock where a large pile of fresh fish lies in a net on the ground. The character approaches the fish, revealing scattered individual fish on the concrete, and looks up to see a woman in a pink shirt standing near a wooden market stall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet, dimly lit patio into the heart of a coastal fishing village at night. It begins by navigating around a white plastic table and chairs on a patio before moving past potted plants toward a green wooden house. As the camera enters a narrow side yard, it follows a dirt path along the house wall, passing a large tree and a beached wooden boat before squeezing through a tight passage between buildings. The scene then opens into a wider village street lined with wooden shacks and beached boats under a cloudy sky, drawing the camera forward toward the glow of a yellow house adorned with colorful string lights. Finally, the path leads onto a concrete fishing dock where the camera approaches a large pile of fresh fish in a net before looking up toward a woman in a pink shirt standing by a wooden market stall.
